vendor_id.name: vendor_id
vendor_id.comment: A code indicating the LPEP provider that provided the record. 1= Creative Mobile Technologies, LLC; 2= VeriFone Inc.

pickup_datetime.name: pickup_datetime
pickup_datetime.comment: The date and time when the meter was engaged

dropoff_datetime.name: dropoff_datetime
dropoff_datetime.comment: The date and time when the meter was disengaged

passenger_count.name: passenger_count
passenger_count.comment: The number of passengers in the vehicle. This is a driver-entered value.

trip_distance.name: trip_distance
trip_distance.comment: The elapsed trip distance in miles reported by the taximeter.

rate_code.name: rate_code
rate_code.comment: The final rate code in effect at the end of the trip. 1= Standard rate 2=JFK 3=Newark 4=Nassau or Westchester 5=Negotiated fare 6=Group ride

store_and_fwd_flag.name: store_and_fwd_flag
store_and_fwd_flag.comment: This flag indicates whether the trip record was held in vehicle memory before sending to the vendor, aka 'store and forward,' because the vehicle did not have a connection to the server. Y= store and forward trip N= not a store and forward trip

payment_type.name: payment_type
payment_type.comment: A numeric code signifying how the passenger paid for the trip. 1= Credit card 2= Cash 3= No charge 4= Dispute 5= Unknown 6= Voided trip

fare_amount.name: fare_amount
fare_amount.comment: The time-and-distance fare calculated by the meter

extra.name: extra
extra.comment: Miscellaneous extras and surcharges. Currently, this only includes the $0.50 and $1 rush hour and overnight charges

mta_tax.name: mta_tax
mta_tax.comment: $0.50 MTA tax that is automatically triggered based on the metered rate in use

tip_amount.name: tip_amount
tip_amount.comment: Tip amount. This field is automatically populated for credit card tips. Cash tips are not included.

tolls_amount.name: tolls_amount
tolls_amount.comment: Total amount of all tolls paid in trip.

imp_surcharge.name: imp_surcharge
imp_surcharge.comment: $0.30 improvement surcharge assessed on hailed trips at the flag drop. The improvement surcharge began being levied in 2015.

total_amount.name: total_amount
total_amount.comment: The total amount charged to passengers. Does not include cash tips.

pickup_location_id.name: pickup_location_id
pickup_location_id.comment: TLC Taxi Zone in which the taximeter was engaged

dropoff_location_id.name: dropoff_location_id
dropoff_location_id.comment: TLC Taxi Zone in which the taximeter was disengaged
